summary: Iteration 22: Complete E2E testing of DB-driven Bulk Upload Queue System. All 19 backend tests pass, all frontend tests pass. The new system processes files sequentially via a persistent background worker that runs independent of UI.

backend: GET /api/bulk-upload/status - returns pending, processed, failed arrays per type (naukri, pipeline, score)
POST /api/bulk-upload/process-now - returns worker status with pending/processing counts
POST /api/bulk-upload/naukri - uploads file and creates queue record in bulk_upload_queue collection
POST /api/bulk-upload/invalid_type - returns 400 for invalid upload type
DELETE /api/bulk-upload/{type}/{queue_id} - removes pending file from queue and disk
DELETE with invalid queue ID returns 400
DELETE with non-existent queue ID returns 404
Background worker processes pending files within ~5 seconds
Processed files include result with inserted/updated counts
Invalid file shows error message in failed list
Queue status shows correct counts for all types
frontend: Bulk upload modal opens from Dashboard via 'Bulk' button
Modal shows 'Processing is automatic & sequential' message
PENDING / PROCESSING section shows count and file list
No pending files message shown when queue is empty
FAILED section shows when failures exist with error messages
processed_files folder is clickable to expand/collapse (data-testid='toggle-processed-btn')
Processed files list shows file names, sizes, and insert/update counts
All three bulk upload types work (Naukri, Pipeline, Score)

critical_code_review_comments: Background worker (_bg_queue_worker) runs as asyncio task started at app startup
Worker polls every 3 seconds for pending jobs (FIFO order)
Files stored in /app/uploads/{type}/ and moved to /app/processed_files/{type}/ on success
Route ordering: /bulk-upload/status and /bulk-upload/process-now registered BEFORE /bulk-upload/{upload_type} to avoid FastAPI path conflicts
On startup, stuck 'processing' records are reset to 'pending' (startup_event)
DELETE returns 409 if file status is 'processing' (cannot delete while processing)
Frontend uses manual refresh button instead of polling (no automatic polling)
seed_data_creation: Test data created via bulk upload API with TEST_ prefixed files. Test files uploaded: test_bulk_upload.csv, test_pipeline_bulk.csv, test_score_bulk.csv, test_worker_processing.csv, test_invalid_file.csv (failed). Processed files moved to /app/processed_files/{type}/.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bulk Upload Queue System fully tested and working. Key features: (1) POST /api/bulk-upload/{type} uploads files and creates queue records, (2) GET /api/bulk-upload/status returns pending/processed/failed arrays per type, (3) Background worker processes files sequentially every 3 seconds, (4) Files move from /app/uploads/{type}/ to /app/processed_files/{type}/ on success, (5) Failed files show error_message in status, (6) DELETE returns 409 if file is processing, (7) On startup, stuck processing records reset to pending. Frontend data-testid attributes: bulk-modal, bulk-file-input, bulk-file-input-label, refresh-btn, pending-list, pending-file-{id}, delete-{id}, toggle-processed-btn, processed-list, failed-list, failed-file-{id}, no-pending, no-processed, bulk-modal-close.
